description: iOS system framework capabilities mapped to HarmonyOS NEXT Kits, permissions, manifest changes and platform adapter boundaries.

permission.notes: Implement explicit permission/query flow and local notification publish API.

manifest.notes: Declare notification-related permission/configuration according to target HarmonyOS NEXT SDK.

implementation_notes: Separate permission state from publish API.
Preserve settings switch and request-permission entry.
Badge behavior may require platform-specific handling.
capabilities.fallback: Keep in-app badge and foreground alert if background/local notification delivery is unavailable.

permission.notes: Background execution policy differs; exact API depends on SDK and app type.

implementation_notes: Do not assume 15-minute background execution parity.
Keep foreground refresh as primary path.
Wrap scheduling behind adapter so product can degrade gracefully.
capabilities.fallback: Foreground refresh plus refresh-on-launch if background execution is not available.

permission.notes: Request location permission before using location-based features.

manifest.notes: Declare approximate/precise location permission as needed.

implementation_notes: Expose one-shot current location API.
Support manual location entry as fallback.
capabilities.fallback: Use manually entered location when location permission is denied.

permission.notes: Network permission/config may still be needed.

implementation_notes: Preserve loading state and close/share actions.
Use a page-level wrapper so WebView lifecycle is isolated.
capabilities.fallback: Open original URL externally if embedded WebView is blocked.

harmony.api_area: atomic service card or widget form

permission.notes: Widget/card publish model differs from WidgetKit.

manifest.notes: May require card/form metadata and service extension declaration.

implementation_notes: Treat widget as separate deliverable from main app.
Start with one card size if full small/medium/large parity is costly.
Define cached data input contract for the card.
capabilities.fallback: Defer widget/card implementation while preserving shared cache service.

permission.notes: Internet/network access permission may be required.

implementation_notes: Create shared HttpClient for all network requests.
Preserve timeout/error fallback behavior.
capabilities.fallback: Use fixed sample data when network fails.

harmony.kit: ArkTS XML parser or bundled parser

implementation_notes: Implement XML/RSS/Atom parsing as pure service utility.
Normalize date parsing and HTML stripping behavior.
capabilities.fallback: Skip malformed feed items and continue parsing.

harmony.kit: Text/NLP service or local heuristic implementation

permission.notes: Exact on-device NLP parity may not be available.

implementation_notes: Keep analysis APIs stable.
Start with heuristic or disabled analysis if no equivalent Kit is available.
Do not block feed display on analysis failure.
Expose shareUrl(url, title?) API.
Keep share button placement in detail pages and WebView.
capabilities.fallback: Copy URL to clipboard if share sheet is unavailable.

permission.notes: Local server behavior may require special permission or may not be suitable for mobile app store distribution.

manifest.notes: Depends on whether local API is retained.

implementation_notes: Confirm whether local loopback API is required in Harmony version.
If retained, isolate behind optional LocalApiAdapter.
capabilities.fallback: Disable local API and keep internal status service only.
